heading: Protection, use and management of renewable resources on non-Federal lands; utilization of Assessment, surveys and Program by Secretary to assist States, etc.
label: 1605 Protection, use and management of renewable resources on non-Federal lands; utilization of Assessment, surveys and Program by Secretary to assist States, etc.
text: The Secretary may utilize the Assessment, resource surveys, and Program prepared pursuant to this subchapter to assist States and other organizations in proposing the planning for the protection, use, and management of renewable resources on non-Federal land.
notes: Amendments2018— substituted “Secretary” for “Secretary of Agriculture”.Pub. L. 115–141
amendments: Amendments2018— substituted “Secretary” for “Secretary of Agriculture”.Pub. L. 115–141
